content: The new file will replace the existing one as a new version.

comment.text: The translation key "OverwriteDescription" is used to display a message when a user chooses to overwrite an existing file. This message informs users that their new file will replace the current one as a new version. It appears in dialog boxes, such as the ConflictResolveDialog, where users can select action options.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation states the file will be 'added' (əlavə olunacaq) to a file with the same name, whereas the English source explicitly states it will 'replace' (replace/overwrite) the existing one as a new version.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Yeni fayl mövcud faylı yeni versiya kimi əvəz edəcək.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation states the file will be 'added' (добавен) to the existing file, whereas the English source states it will 'replace' (replace) the existing one. This changes the core action from replacement to appending/merging.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Новият файл ще замени съществуващия като нова версия.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Czech translation states that the file will be 'added to a file with the same name as a version', which implies a merge or an addition, whereas the English text explicitly states the new file will 'replace' the existing one.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nový soubor nahradí stávající soubor jako novou verzi.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The German translation implies the existing file is being replaced by a new version, whereas the English text specifies that the *new file* is what will replace the existing one as a new version. The German version loses the subject 'The new file'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Die neue Datei wird die vorhandene Datei als neue Version ersetzen.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation implies the file is being 'added to' (lisätään tiedostoon) rather than 'replacing' (korvaa) the existing one, which changes the technical meaning of an overwrite action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Uusi tiedosto korvaa olemassa olevan tiedoston uutena versiona.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Japanese translation implies that a version is being added to a file with the same name, whereas the English text explicitly states that the new file will 'replace' the existing one as a new version. The current Japanese phrasing is passive and slightly ambiguous regarding the replacement action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 新しいファイルは、既存のファイルの新しいバージョンとして上書きされます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation says 'The file will be added to a file with the same name', which implies merging or appending, whereas the English text explicitly states the new file will 'replace' the existing one as a 'new version'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 새 파일이 기존 파일을 새 버전으로 대체합니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the specific detail that the file is being replaced 'as a new version', which is a key piece of information in the context of version control/conflict resolution.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ໄຟລ໌ໃໝ່ຈະຖືກນຳໃຊ້ແທນທີ່ໄຟລ໌ທີ່ມີຢູ່ແລ້ວ ໃນຖານະເປັນເວີຊັນໃໝ່.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation says the file will be 'added' (pievienots) as a version, whereas the English text explicitly states the new file will 'replace' (replace) the existing one. This changes the core logic of the action from 'overwrite/replace' to 'append/add'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jaunais fails aizstāses ar esošo kā jauna versija.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Dutch translation states the file will be 'added to the file with the same name' (toegevoegd aan), whereas the English source states it will 'replace' (vervangen) the existing one.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Het nieuwe bestand zal het bestaande bestand vervangen als een nieuwe versie.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation states the file will be 'added' (adicionado), whereas the English source explicitly states it will 'replace' (replace) the existing one. This changes the fundamental meaning of the overwrite action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: O novo arquivo substituirá o existente como uma nova versão.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation is nonsensical and conveys a completely different meaning. It translates roughly to 'The file will be helped as a version of the file with the same name', which does not communicate that the new file will replace the existing one.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Noul fișier va înlocui fișierul existent ca o nouă versiune.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation changes the meaning from 'replacing the existing file' to 'adding to a file with the same name', which is a different action and potentially confusing in a conflict resolution context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nový súbor nahradí existujúci súbor ako novú verziu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation states that the file will be 'added' (dodana) to the existing one, whereas the English source explicitly states it will 'replace' (replace) the existing one. This changes the core meaning of the overwrite action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nova datoteka bo zamenjala obstoječo kot nova različica.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Turkish translation says the file will be 'added' (eklenecektir) as a version, whereas the English text explicitly states it will 'replace' (replace) the existing one. This changes the core meaning of the overwrite action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Yeni dosya, mevcut olanın yerine yeni bir versiyon olarak geçecektir.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation incorrectly states that the file will be 'added to a file with the same name' (implying a merge or append), whereas the English source clearly states the new file will 'replace' the existing one as a new version.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Новий файл замінить існуючий як нову версію.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation implies the file will be 'added to' (thêm vào) the existing file, whereas the English source states it will 'replace' (thay thế) the existing one. This changes the core meaning of the overwrite action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Tệp mới sẽ thay thế tệp hiện có dưới dạng một phiên bản mới.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation conveys the opposite meaning. The English text states the file WILL replace the existing one, whereas the Chinese text states they will exist as different versions (implying no replacement/overwrite occurs).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 新文件将作为新版本替换现有文件。
